description: Alice schedules a 90-minute job interview at Apex Technologies on Wednesday at 2 PM and requests confidentiality.

events.title: Interview at Apex Technologies
events.reasoning: Alice has a job interview on Wednesday at 2 PM at Apex Technologies on Grant Avenue. Duration stated as about 1.5 hours, ending around 3:30 PM.
events.assumptions: End time set to 3:30 PM based on Alice's explicit statement 'blocked from 2 to roughly 3:30 PM'.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: job interview at Apex Technologies on Wednesday 2-3:30 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Wednesday' resolves to 2026-02-25. Duration explicitly stated as 'about an hour and a half'. Confidentiality requested but no attendees other than Alice.
